title: helichrysum tephrodes
intro: Helichrysum tephrodes, also known as the mountain daisy or yellow mountain daisy, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum tephrodes include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. It is often prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and capsules, allowing for various forms of administration, including topical application and internal consumption.
